# Pull Request Template

## Description

Please include a summary of the changes and related context. Include any relevant motivation and context.

### Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to change)
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Infrastructure/Deployment change

## Related Issue

Fixes #(issue number) or relates to #(issue number)

## Changes Made

- Change 1
- Change 2
- Change 3

## Testing

Please describe the tests you ran to verify your changes:

### Test Configuration

- Python version: 3.11+
- Environment: (dev/test/prod)
- Azure services tested: (if applicable)

### Test Coverage

- [ ] Unit tests added/updated
- [ ] Integration tests added/updated
- [ ] Manual testing completed
- [ ] No existing tests broken

### How to Test

```bash
# Provide step-by-step instructions
cd src/foundry-agents
python manual_test_harness.py
```

## Checklist

- [ ] My code follows the code style of this project
- [ ] I have updated the documentation accordingly
- [ ] I have added tests that prove my fix is effective or that my feature works
- [ ] New and existing unit tests passed locally with my changes
- [ ] I have not added any secrets, credentials, or sensitive information
- [ ] I have used managed identities instead of connection strings (for Azure code)
- [ ] I have followed the commit message conventions (feat/fix/docs/etc.)
- [ ] I have added appropriate comments to complex code sections

## Screenshots or Logs (if applicable)

Please add any screenshots, diagrams, or relevant log excerpts.

## Additional Notes

Any additional context that reviewers should know about your changes.

---

Thank you for your contribution! 🙏
